# BLACKFIRST®

> BLACKFIRST is an executive chauffeur and private mobility house based in
> Geneva, Switzerland — airport transfers, business travel, private events and
> long-distance journeys across Switzerland and Europe, with Swiss precision and
> total discretion.

Contact: reservations@blackfirst.ch

## Services
- [Airport Executive](https://blackfirst.ch/en/services/airport-transfer): private airport transfers, flight tracking, meet & greet — Geneva, Zurich, Lausanne, Alpine resorts.
- [Business Mobility](https://blackfirst.ch/en/services/business-chauffeur): dedicated chauffeur by the hour, half-day or day; discreet, signal-clear cabin for executives.
- [Luxury Events](https://blackfirst.ch/en/services/events): weddings, private galas and celebrations — one car or a coordinated fleet.
- [International Chauffeur](https://blackfirst.ch/en/services/long-distance): long-distance journeys across Switzerland, France and Europe; tolls and vignettes included.

## Pages
- [Fleet](https://blackfirst.ch/en/fleet): recent Mercedes-Benz — S-Class, E-Class, V-Class VIP, electric EQS.
- [Areas served](https://blackfirst.ch/en/locations): Geneva, Lausanne, Montreux, Verbier, Courchevel, Lyon, Milan.
- [About](https://blackfirst.ch/en/about)
- [Book a chauffeur](https://blackfirst.ch/en/booking)
- [Contact](https://blackfirst.ch/en/contact)

## Languages
- [Version française](https://blackfirst.ch/fr)
